title: cryptocoryne elliptica
intro: Cryptocoryne elliptica, also known as the elliptical Cryptocoryne or Java Fern, is a species of aquatic plant native to Sri Lanka and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cryptocoryne elliptica include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
